creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 224266
patch to update the port

- Update 0.079 -> 0.080
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/PPIx-Regexp

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
12.2-RELEASE-p6
pkg 1.16.3
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.1
openssl 1.1.1h
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
